description: A customer is asking for the current status of their international sea freight shipment.

nodes.task_description: Get the sales order or container number from the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the shipment identifier.

nodes.task_description: Use the container number to query the carrier's tracking portal via an integrated tool.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the latest tracking update, which shows 'On the water, ETA Shanghai: 5 days'.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer with the current location and estimated time of arrival.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the shipment status to the customer.
